# unstructured_source (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an existing source connector. Look up by `id` or `name` (exactly one must be specified).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by ID
data "unstructured_source" "by_id" {
  id = "existing-source-connector-uuid"
}

# Look up by name
data "unstructured_source" "by_name" {
  name = "my-s3-source"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the source connector. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.
- `name` (String) The name of the source connector. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `config` (String, Sensitive) The JSON-encoded connector configuration.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the source connector was created.
- `type` (String) The type of source connector.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the source connector was last updated.
